name: Akamai Technologies, Inc.
h1: Akamai Technologies's GCC footprint in India
lede: Akamai Technologies runs three centers across three Indian cities. Bengaluru, Mumbai and Chennai, covering CoE and IT, built over twelve years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Akamai Technologies office in India. We map three, across three cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Akamai Technologies GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Akamai Technologies runs 3 verified centers across 3 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Mumbai, Chennai), covering CoE and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Akamai Technologies's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Mumbai and Chennai, spanning CoE and IT. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 39 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Akamai Technologies operates 3 active centers in India.
